title: Ving Rhames ‘On His Way Home’ and ‘Cracking Jokes’ After Collapsing in Restaurant
summary: “Mission: Impossible” actor Ving Rhames is “on his way home” and feeling fine after a health scare in a Los Angeles-area restaurant on Wednesday, his rep confirmed. “He sounded like everyday Ving and cracked a joke over the phone,” manager Brad Kramer told Variety. The 66-year-old actor was rushed …
